http_terminal_ceiling.reason: HTTP-terminal dim4 ceiling LIFTED for all 3: owner+shared HTTP core@0x140825280 GENUINE recovered (NOT ICF), transport reused from ceiling-crack. external_call_recorded boundary remains but is now a fully-explained accepted_unknown non-critical residual (server reply drives no binary logic; healthScore latency-only). dim6 mock-assertable via fake_http_server (Cargo + Vitest). The only remaining gate keeping these 3 at strictImplementationUse on Windows is dim1 frontend CCF=not_closed_windows (product_decision), NOT the HTTP terminal.

source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.deactivate_relay_provider: source archive ignores providerId; deactivates current active provider. Upstream uses providerId for lookup.
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.delete_relay_provider: source archive errors on not-found; upstream is idempotent (returns ok/enabled struct).
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.set_codex_router_enabled: source archive has no relaunch arg; always relaunches. Upstream has explicit relaunch:bool param.
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.run_codex_router_diagnostics: source archive IPC name is 'diagnose_codex_router'; upstream is 'run_codex_router_diagnostics'.
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.fix_codex_router_issue: source archive issue taxonomy differs from upstream IDA itemId table. source archive does NOT kill Codex on fix.
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.test_relay_draft: source archive does NOT persist draft health state; upstream writes via __draft__ id.
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.get_relay_active: source archive returns bool (RelayActivePayload.enabled); upstream encodes as enum tag=2+'ok'/'enabled' string pair.
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.get_relay_proxy_status: source archive field names (running/port/baseUrl/codexBaseUrl/lastError) differ from upstream (has_proxy/network/url/port).
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.upsert_relay_provider: source archive has no upstream rate-limit check (file-based stateless design). source archive adds tray_menu refresh.
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.import_relay_config: source archive accepts both file object and filePath (two forms). Upstream single form.
source archive_behavioral_deltas_product.export_relay_config: source archive returns RelayExportFile struct; redaction via exportable_extra_headers. Upstream masks inline.
